prices.source_phrase: As a Blue Star Museum , the Currier is proud to offer free general admission to active duty military* and Veterans, as well as their families.
prices.source_block:
Veterans &Active Duty Military *

​As a Blue Star Museum , the Currier is proud to offer free general admission to active duty military* and Veterans, as well as their families.

*Includes National Guard and reserves.

Thank you
for your service.

reservation.source_phrase: Join our expert and engaging guides for tour experiences included in museum admission.
reservation.source_block:
Visitor Tours

Join our expert and engaging guides for tour experiences included in museum admission.

Highlights Tour

1pm | Wednesday through Sunday

​ Guide facilitated

Spend 45 minutes with a guide exploring significant, iconic, and just-plain-fun works of art throughout the museum.
